_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: We found that the Nf1 +/neo, but not the Nf1 +/1809, neurons had increased activity relative to WT RGCs, as measured by action potential (AP) firing rates
resourceName: Nf1 c.5425 C > T ; Arg1809Cys-mutant mice
details: Nf1 +/1809 neurons did not have increased activity relative to WT RGCs, with no change in action potential firing rates compared to 2.5-3.9-fold increase seen in Nf1 +/neo neurons
